text: Nous Research profile: World-class open source AI; Discord discord.gg/nousresearch; USA; hermes-agent.nousresearch.com; 2,334 posts; 26 following; 15.4万 followers; hiring MLE roles for pretraining data, reinforcement-learning training infrastructure, and general training infrastructure.

Hermes Agent v0.11.0, The Interface Release. Post points to a full changelog thread and includes a 1:51 video. Follow-up links release notes on GitHub and tells users to run hermes update. Visible release-note image references an interactive CLI/interface update, provider transport architecture, native MCP support, file references, and message-platform work.
Full release notes for Hermes Agent v0.11.0 are linked to GitHub. Nous tells users to run hermes update to receive the release.
Nous says the Shopify team built an official Hermes Agent skill. The skill enables an agent to manage Shopify products, orders, inventory, and fulfillments from any channel.

Shopify CEO Tobi Lutke quote-tweets the official Hermes Agent Shopify skill and says it is strong. This validates the integration as a partner-endorsed workflow rather than only a Nous marketing post.

Nous quote-tweets Alex Volkov's Hermes migration/install note and says one Hermes install later, things just click. The quoted post says Alex had installed Hermes several times before, then reinstalled and ported a workflow to Hermes well enough to get started.
